pages.title: Animation Patterns
pages.body:
# Animation Patterns

The preview shows three meshes using different motion patterns:

- Red sphere: sine wave (smooth oscillation)
- Green box: sawtooth via modulo (linear repeat)
- Yellow torus: easeInOut (smooth start and end)

All animation in Artlab happens in the update() function, called every frame before rendering. It receives `ctx.elapsed` (total seconds) and `dt` (seconds since last frame).

Use → to explore each pattern.
